name: Surprise Cheeseburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. For the cheesey filling, combine 5 oz Process cheese spread, 2 tbsp Sweet pickle relish, and 2 ts Prepared mustard.
2. Spread the filling on the center of 6 patties.
3. Cover with the remaining patties and pinch the edges together to seal.
4. Place under the broiler about 4 inches from the heat source.
5. Cook for 7 minutes, then turn and cook an additional 5 minutes.
6. Serve on toasted hamburger buns.
FAVORITE HAMBURGERS: Omit onion salt in the above burger recipe. Add 1/4 cup finely-chopped onion and 1-1/2 teaspoons salt. Combine all ingredients thoroughly. Shape into 6 patties. Broil or pan-fry for 7 minutes, turning and cooking an additional 4 to 5 minutes.
